note: The never-slower ratchet (BAKE_A_BUN 9.1). Each suite: locked_ratio (ratio=ours/oracle, only ever DECREASES), a rolling sigma_window (per-suite noise, floor 5%), a metric kind, and an integrity seal (chainDigest over the sealed fields; a loosening hand-edit goes stale and L12 catches it). FOUR metric kinds ratcheted identically: wall-clock, peak-rss, binary-size, build-time.

suites.note: W0.D release build of logos-bun (largo build); the G11 evidence stream, tracked from now.
